scripts.build: npm run build:library && npx shopify hydrogen build --codegen --path examples/hydrogen
scripts.dev: npm run build:library && npx shopify hydrogen dev --codegen --path examples/hydrogen
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @judgeme-react/core && npm run lint --workspace @judgeme-react/hydrogen-example
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @judgeme-react/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @judgeme-react/hydrogen-example
